case_title: HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOCIATES VS GOGGIN, TERRENCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,947.05 FILED BY HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT GOGGIN, TERRENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOGGIN, TERRENCE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-26-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-13-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL. COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF FROM THE CASE. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANNAH KAUFMAN & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOGGIN, TERRENCE $1,947.05 PRINCIPAL, $59.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,006.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DECLARATION FILED BY PLTF; REQUEST FOR CASE NOT TO BE HEARD BY COMM. ROSEN-PARK.
